context: Activation-focused scenario: tests whether a pre-publish reachability question activates a skill in this tile (expected: setup-skill-performance Phase 4a or optimize-skill-instructions). Criteria below are placeholders for future content-eval use; activation eval ignores them.

checklist.name: Recommends activation eval first
checklist.description: Response recommends running an activation eval (--skip-forced-context-activation --skip-scoring) before the slower content eval, explaining it's the fast routing-only check.

checklist.name: Defines pass/fail criteria
checklist.description: Response describes what counts as a passing routing check versus what indicates fixes are needed before publishing.
